description: Base Claude Code settings for @tcs-bpi/ai-team. Common permissions and hooks shared across all role configurations.

pre-commit.description: Run quick code review checks on staged changes before committing

pre-tool.description: Enforce role-based file and tool boundaries

code-review.description: Structured code review with severity levels

security-audit.description: OWASP Top 10 and dependency vulnerability audit

write-docs.description: Generate API docs, README sections, and inline comments

plan-sprint.description: Sprint planning with task breakdown and estimation

run-tests.description: Run tests, analyze failures, and suggest fixes

rules: Always read files before modifying them.
Never add new dependencies without user approval.
Never force-push to main or master.
Follow the project's existing code style and conventions.
Include both the file path and line number when referencing code in reviews.
